subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Bountiful, from the Kingdom of His utterance, the Impenetrable, the Ancient. There is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ابراهیم ان استمع ندآء ربک الکریم من ملکوت بیانه الممتنع القدیم لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the concourse on high, @wisdom [hikmat]
